general: Check field names match schema exactly (case sensitive)
Check data types (string vs number vs boolean)
Use the inputSchema from directive response as reference
json_format: Check for missing quotes around string values
Remove trailing commas after last array/object item
Ensure all brackets are properly matched: { } [ ]
Use JSON validator (jsonlint.com) to check syntax
workflow_troubleshooting: Use list() to see available workflows
Check if workflow was created successfully
process_troubleshooting: Use session({ action: 'executions' }) to list active executions
Check if workflow execution is still active
auth_troubleshooting: Re-authorize MCP server in client settings
connection_troubleshooting: Try reconnecting MCP server in client settings
tool_update_troubleshooting: MCP server may have been updated
Reconnect MCP server to get latest tool definitions
settings_troubleshooting: Only user settings can be modified
Use settings({ action: 'list' }) to see available settings
help_troubleshooting: Use help() without arguments to see all available topics
Try using topic aliases: overview, intro, pattern
